name: PCI Firewall Inbound Rules Reviewed
description: Ensures firewall and router rule sets are reviewed at least every 6 months (PCI DSS 1.1.7)
query: SELECT id, name, direction, last_reviewed_date FROM firewall_rules WHERE direction = 'inbound' AND cde_scope = true AND (last_reviewed_date IS NULL OR last_reviewed_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days')
remediation: Review all inbound firewall rules every 6 months. Document the review and remove unnecessary rules.
